_note: Time-Map atlas styling. Edit these values then `npm run build`. Colours are CSS hex strings. `palette` = the muted territory-fill hues, assigned per polity by a stable hash of its osm_id (any length is fine). `selected`/`hover` = fill colours when a region is clicked / under the cursor. `fillOpacity` = territory fill opacity in each state. `line` = the territory boundary outline. `land`/`water` = the base map.
